Dropping quoted kwarg from normalize_url @bmaz @boogheta this is quite breaking. I chose to switch to unquoted urls for two reasons: 1. browsers do the same 2. multiple unquoting is safe, multiple quoting is not and leads to nasty issues I still keep spaces as quoted, like browsers though.
